title: extract_response pub(crate) contradicts its own doc preference
description: call_batch doc says 'Prefer call + extract_response for single-method requests' but extract_response is pub(crate) and unavailable to external callers — the stated preference is unreachable from outside the crate. A user reading the call_batch doc will look for extract_response, find it missing from the public API, file a confused bug report, and the maintainer must either promote the function or rewrite the doc. The lie fossilizes the moment anyone depends on call_batch.
